quality.rationale: 完整弱场近似+多步推导+真实天体物理场景（卫星自旋进动）

origin.question: Problem 11.11. A gyroscope is placed in a circular orbit about the Earth and no torques are applied to it. What is the angular velocity of precession for its spin vector relative to a reference frame fixed with respect to the distant stars? ("geodetic precession" and "Lens-Thirring effect").
